uncertainty_narrative: Applying Bayesian uncertainty propagation (PyMC, 10,000 samples), the 95% confidence interval spans 17768 to 20617 tCO2e, representing ±7.4% of the central estimate.
recommendation_narrative: Switching 43% of the motorbike fleet to CNG would reduce Scope 1 emissions by 1155 tCO2e annually at a cost of KSh 5608 per tonne avoided.
full_narrative: The company's 108 owned and leased vehicles produced 11598 tCO2e in Scope 1, computed at Tier 2 using vehicle-class-specific DEFRA 2024 emission factors with the Kenya NTSA road adjustment. Emission intensity was 0.912 tCO2e per KSh million revenue, compared to a sector median of 0.903. Applying Bayesian uncertainty propagation (PyMC, 10,000 samples), the 95% confidence interval spans 17768 to 20617 tCO2e, representing ±7.4% of the central estimate. Switching 43% of the motorbike fleet to CNG would reduce Scope 1 emissions by 1155 tCO2e annually at a cost of KSh 5608 per tonne avoided.

uncertainty_narrative: The 95% confidence interval on the total emission figure is ±7.4%, yielding a range of 13981–16212 tCO2e, derived from Bayesian Monte Carlo simulation using PyMC.
recommendation_narrative: Replacing 49% of short-haul business flights with video conferencing would reduce Scope 3 Cat 6 emissions by approximately 1036 tCO2e per year.
